/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Wall -Wextra -Wno-unused-parameter -O3 -march=native -ffast-math -fopenmp -mavx2 -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libcyberhex.so -o libcyberhex.so CMakeFiles/cyberhex.dir/src/activations.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cyberhex.dir/src/dense.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cyberhex.dir/src/loss.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cyberhex.dir/src/model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cyberhex.dir/src/optimizer.cpp.o  -lpthread /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/14/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a
